articles.author: Dasha Burns, Liz Crampton
articles.title: Trump is delaying Texas Senate endorsement to pressure GOP senators on SAVE America Act - Politico
articles.description: Sen. John Cornyn and Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton are vying for a nod from Trump
articles.content:
The White House did not respond to a request for comment. 
I think that was a very smart strategy because it bought time. Because now, if youre the White House or Trump, why would you now weigh in? … [+4566 chars]
